_comment: Two tests deliberately import across the runstatus package boundary (an ESM, "type":"module" package) and are excluded from THIS CommonJS-resolution tsc program, which cannot model the cross-package ESM graph (rootDir + module-format conflicts that are meaningless here). Both are still fully exercised by their real runners: bridge-relay.integration.test.ts (tsx + node:test via `pnpm test`) imports the SPA's BridgeTransport to guard the postMessage wire format; vscode-tour.e2e.spec.ts (Playwright's esbuild transform via `pnpm e2e` / `make vscode-e2e-fast`, the de-risk gate) imports the generated WEATHER_REPORT_TOUR_STEPS manifest so the recorded narration cannot drift from the live web tour.
